message:
test(fj-conformance): broaden tensor dtype promotion sweep to all dtype pairs (frankenjax-13b6)

dtype_promotion_tensor_level previously gated each case behind a
"lhs_is_half || rhs_is_half" filter, which meant the sweep only
exercised pairs that included at least one half-precision tensor
type (f16/f32/bf16). Same-integer-tensor and integer-with-f64 pairs
were silently skipped even though both operands were in the supported
tensor_dtypes set.

Drop the half-precision gate so every (lhs, rhs) pair drawn from
[bool, i32, i64, u32, u64, f16, f32, f64, bf16] runs through the
JAX-oracle parity check. Update the surrounding doc comment and the
in-line "// Expand to float types ..." remark to match the new
intent.

Continues frankenjax-13b6 — pairs cleanly with the prior i32 enum
addition. Cases the sweep cannot find in the bundle still hit the
existing "let Some(case) = ..." continue, so the only behavioral
change is more parity coverage being executed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
